list.title: My Servers
list.empty: You don't have any servers yet.
list.delete_category_confirm: Delete this category? Servers will move to Uncategorized.

install.in_progress_description: Wings is preparing your server. Other panels are unavailable until the install completes — only the live console is accessible.
install.completed_description: Your server is ready. The dashboard will switch to the regular overview shortly.
install.waiting_for_output: Waiting for the first install lines from Wings…
install.console_only_notice: This server is still installing. Only the console and the overview are accessible until Wings reports the install as completed.

suspended.title: This server is currently suspended.
suspended.description: Your hosting provider has paused this server. Files, backups and configuration are preserved — only power, console and live actions are blocked.
suspended.info_kept: Your data, configuration and backups are kept intact and will be restored as-is when the server is reactivated.
suspended.info_no_power: Start / stop / restart and the live console are disabled while the server is suspended — Wings rejects every command.
suspended.info_reactivate: Contact your hosting provider or reactivate your subscription to restore access.

conflict.failed_description: An operator can retry the install from the overview. This page stays unavailable until the install completes.

banner.unreachable_body: The machine hosting your server ({{node}}) is not responding right now. If your server was online it most likely still is, but the console, files and power actions are unavailable. Our team is aware — no need to restart anything.
banner.degraded_body: The machine hosting your server ({{node}}) is slower than usual ({{latency}} ms). The console and file operations may lag for a while.
banner.server_unreachable_title: Your server is unreachable on its node
banner.server_unreachable_body: The node {{node}} is online but your server does not respond on it. If this persists more than a few minutes, please contact support.
banner.server_errors_body: The node {{node}} is online but operations on your server (files, console…) are failing right now. Our team has been notified — this usually clears after a quick maintenance on the node.
banner.maintenance_body: The machine hosting your server ({{node}}) is undergoing maintenance. Some actions are temporarily unavailable — everything will be back shortly.

completion.install: Installation complete. The server is ready.
completion.modpack_uninstall: Modpack uninstalled. The server is back to vanilla.
